TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Turkmenistan, title = Turkmenistan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Turkmenistan} }

S.FORM: = Turkmenistan = Gaga kska Yacow ka Turkmenistan, 40 00 N, 60 00 E ka gaga na nniqan. Kana ka knlbangan na o 488,100 sq km(hangan na o Tg53) (knlbanga dxgal o 469,930 sq km, knlbangan qsiya o 18,170 sq km). Kana ka sejiqun o niqan 5,291,317 hiyi. Gaga Ashgabat ka pusu alang paru, jiyax 27 idas 10 ka jiyax skrayan klwaan. Manu ka dxgal Turkmenistan ga wada sugan 72% ka dxgal qpahan, 8.80% ka dxgal bbuyu, rahuq dxgal do niqan 19.20% na. Bukung klwaan ta sayang o kiya ka Gurbanguly Berdimuhamedow, pnaah hngkawas2006 idas 12 jiyax 21pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' = Turkmenistan = Turkmenistan (Kari Turkmenistan: T√ľrkmenistan ) ka kingal Tukcka Asia tuiwil hunac na qlhangan kcka dxral, tuiwil u msdalih Ucilung Li, tudaya mi tunarac mi tuhunac u pskingal psqapah Kazakhstan, Ocbek, Afghani mi Iran, knlbangan tndxral dha u 49 knbkiyan pinghwang km, mthiti bukuy Kazakhstan na Tukcka Asia tu2 knbeyhing dxral qnlhangan, ya bay 80% qlhangan u wada bungan Karakumu bbnaqi bbuyu. Kngkawas 1991 pkla kari snpeyyah Suryey dukuricu, Turkmenistan uri ka knkana Asia murux bay Ana Dhuq Knuwan Qnlhangan Congri, gasoring mi gasu ida nkiya cuweyn u mttuku balay. Ri-s Brah kongweyn kngkawas 3000, kcka tndxral qlhangan Turkmenistan u mnniqan cyeyci syakay. Ya bay brah kongweyn kngkawas 600 daw, snkkingal Pssryuxan yahan knrmux qmlahang Acimeynid Wangcaw, Sayryoku Tikwo, Tasya. Bukuy daw wada dan knrmux qmlahang Ansi Tikwo na Arsak Wangcaw (Brah kongweyn kngkawas 247- Brah kongweyn kngkawas 224), iyax niyi u wada da knrmux Kuyswang Tikwo dungan. 7 th, sediq Arapo u wada dha ngalan ka Turkmenistan daw, sediq tndxral hiya u kndudul knpriyux snluhay Islam kyo. Sediq Ukus mniq 8-9 seyki cida ka miyah hidu. Cng-c Tubrah niya Turkmenistan u mnSryeyn na 1 nniqan tukcka Asia tumal konghkwo, mniq kngkawas 1991 mkrhak ka Suryeyn daw, wada mdukuricu qnlhangan, muda pnwaya cotocu. Kndadax kngkawas 1985 tumal konghkwo ccida na Turkmenistan kyosangto congyang tu1 suki ka Saparmurat Atayewiki Niyacohu, mniq kngkawas 1991 babaw mkrhak ka Suryeyn daw, wada mdukuricu qnlhangan, muda pnwaya cotocu. Kndadax kngkawas 1985 tumal konghkwo ccida kiya ka Turkmenistan kyosangto congyang tu1 suki ka Saparmurat Atayewiki Niyacohu, mniq kngkawas 1991 idas 12 lmutuc phyuwan soto, kiya mi dmnkuh hiya mangal biyax qmlahang ka Turkmenistan kyosangto pa wada knpriyux hangan Turkmenistan mincu tang, muru dndulan tang msupu seyhu Turkmenistan muda qmpah qmlahang mi hniwan seyji. Babaw dukuricu ka Turkmenistan u ana mntna Porotihay ttu3 qnlhangan ini tumal dukuricu qnlhangan kwosyey, kiya mi dmuwi hniwan ryeynsi qnlhangan tumal quri so pnssliyan dha, kiya u so quri hnyuwan dha dhuq saya u ida ini balay bay mangal snrwanan syeyncang nina. Sing-cng cyu-hwa Turkmenistan singcng cyuhwa kiya ka knkan 5 co mi 1 cusyasu, trahuc 5 co u niqan 16 su mi 46 ka cyu. Trahuc niyi ka knkingal co mi cusyasu (kcka kwahaw ka sohu): Asohapat (Cusyasu) 1 Ahar co (Annau) 2 Parkan co (Parkan Napat) 3 Tasakuc co (Tasakuc) 4 Ryeypapu co (Turkmenistan Napat) 5 Mari co Turkmenistan u wa mniq tudaya Iran, dqras tunarac hunac u tuhuy Afghani msqapah, dqras tunarac daya u tuhuy Ocbekstan msdalih, dqras tuiwil daya ka msdalih Kazakhstan, tuiwil u mssiyaw mrmul langu qsiya Lihay, kiya ka kingal mndungus bay kcka dxral qnlhangan. Knlbangan tndxral dha u 49.12 knbkiyan pihwang km, mthiti bukuy Kazakhstan na Tukcka Asia tu2 knbeyhing dxral qnlhangan; mniq qnlangan u tu51 bnkuwan, tiping hari Spain ka dhiya. Jn-ko Knhbrawan hiyi sediq dha u 603 knbkiyan hiyi (Kngkawas 2002), kcka u to bay Turkmenistan joku ka 77%, thiti daw Ocbek joku ka 9.2%, Russia joku ka 6.7%, Kazakhstan ka 2%, duma so ini khbaraw hiyi minjoku u kiya ka knkana sediq Yameniya, Yasaypayjan joku, sediq Tatan. Ini balay pnsdkanan ka pnsnakan sediq dha, knhbrawan bay sediq u to bay wa mniq alang mkbrnux mi Ryuco, kcka hiya u hbaraw bay uxay sediq Turkmenistan joku ka wa mniq alang mkbrnux, dhiya u Suryeyn jidayi miyah thdil Turkmenistan na llutuc dsediq mpsalu niya mi sediq mpqpah niya. Kiya u msdalih 2/3 na sediq Turkmenistan joku pa to bay wa mniq alang dha nanaq cbiyaw. Cing-ci Kcka qnlhangan sngcan congcu (Kngkawas 2004): 988 knbkiyan oku manat (Ya bay 190 oku pila Amirika). Jncyun kcka qnlhangan sngcan congcu (Kngkawas 2004): 156 knbkiyan Manat. (3000 pila Amirika) Kcaka qnlhangan sngcang congcu mnrana ryu (Kngkawas 2004): 21.4%. Hangan pila: Manat. Huyryu: 1 pila Amirika= 23,700 Manat (Kngkawas 2006 heysu huyryu, seyhu huyryu ka 1:5200). Rrmiwaw Qqpahan rnyawan Turkmenistan, quri so pqita narux sdmhaw rmiwaw, mniq Turkmenistan u wada dmudul pkrana Lihay na Avaza snanan rmiwaw. Txtaxa mpmusa Turkmenistan na sediq mpriwaw u kasi ka dhuq mangal snrwanan cyeycng han, kiya mi hbaraw bay sediq mpriwaw qnlhangan u kasi ka spuda tndxral ryusingso mangal snrwanan cyeyncng. Bnkuwan rnyawan Turkmenistan pa kiya ka knkana rmiwaw Tasakuc, Kuniyaurknci, Nisa, Merhu, Mari, Avaza na bbnaqi mkngahu ucilung, kiya mi tumal diyax smsung mnniq Mollakara, Yylly suw,Archman. Bungka Mniq 18 th brah han, dxral nniqan Turkmenistan u wada dndulan bungka Islam. 18 th u yaha knrmux mangal Sao ka Tukcka Asia, kiya mi smkaul sediq Russia miyah Tukcka Asia tmabun pkrana, bungka Russia u kndudul miyah mrwarang uri da. Binaw kndadax wada mkrhak ka Suryeyn, wada mdukuricu qnlhangan ka Turkmenistan daw, alaw ka wada kndudul mlih ka dndulan niya Russia, kiya mi qnlhangan dha u mbiyax bay dmudul bungka Islam, kiya ka wada mlih ka taxa mi mrana ka taxa da. Minjoku Kwocing weyping Turkmnistan joku 85%, Ocbek joku 5%, Russia joku 4%. Snhiyan Islam kyo ka pusu balay slhayan dha snhiyan, kiya ka knkana knhbrawan hiyi Sediq na 89%, pusu bay ka Syunnipay Muslim. Kiya uri u 9% ka Tongkyo na Kuriscyang. Binaw mniq qmlahang cyangcweyn soto Saparmurat Atayewiki Niyacohu, mbiyax bay dmudul bungka Islam, so snluhay Tongkyo na ini khbaraw sediq Russia u kndudul mlatac Turkmenistan mi thdil icil, so kiya daw wada mlih dndulan niya mniq Turkmenistan ka Tongcngkyo uri da.
S.PHON: = tu…ĺkm…ônistan = gaga kska ja ¶ow ka tu…ĺkm…ônistan, ** ** n, ** ** …ô ka gaga na nniqan. kana ka knlbaŇčan na o ***,*** sq km(ńßaŇčan na o tg**) (knlbaŇča dxgal o ***,*** sq km, knlbaŇčan qsija o **,*** sq km). kana ka s…ô…üiqun o niqan *,***,*** ńßiji. gaga asńßgabat ka pusu alaŇč pa…ĺu, …üijax ** idas ** ka …üijax sk…ĺajan klwaan. manu ka dxgal tu…ĺkm…ônistan ga wada sugan **% ka dxgal qpańßan, *.**% ka dxgal bbuju, …ĺańßuq dxgal do niqan **.**% na. bukuŇč klwaan ta sajaŇč o kija ka gu…ĺbaŇčulj b…ô…ĺdimuńßam…ôdow, pnaańß ńßŇčkawas**** idas ** …üijax **pn…ĺa…üiŇč kmlawa klwaan. ¶inkńßulan sa knita' sa b…ĺbi…ĺu' = tu…ĺkm…ônistan = tu…ĺkm…ônistan (ka…ĺi tu…ĺkm…ônistan: t*…ĺkm…ônistan ) ka kiŇčal tuk ¶ka asia tuiwil ńßuna ¶ na qlńßaŇčan k ¶ka dx…ĺal, tuiwil u msdalińß u ¶iluŇč li, tudaja mi tuna…ĺa ¶ mi tuńßuna ¶ u pskiŇčal psqapańß ka*akńßstan, o ¶b…ôk, a*gńßani mi i…ĺan, knlbaŇčan tndx…ĺal dńßa u ** knbkijan piŇčńßwaŇč km, mtńßiti bukuj ka*akńßstan na tuk ¶ka asia tu* knb…ôńßiŇč dx…ĺal qnlńßaŇčan, ja baj **% qlńßaŇčan u wada buŇčan ka…ĺakumu bbnaqi bbuju. kŇčkawas **** pkla ka…ĺi snp…ôjańß su…ĺj…ô duku…ĺi ¶u, tu…ĺkm…ônistan u…ĺi ka knkana asia mu…ĺux baj ana dńßuq knuwan qnlńßaŇčan ¶oŇč…ĺi, gaso…ĺiŇč mi gasu ida nkija ¶uw…ôn u mttuku balaj. …ĺi-s b…ĺańß koŇčw…ôn kŇčkawas ****, k ¶ka tndx…ĺal qlńßaŇčan tu…ĺkm…ônistan u mnniqan ¶j…ô ¶i sjakaj. ja baj b…ĺańß koŇčw…ôn kŇčkawas *** daw, snkkiŇčal pss…ĺjuxan jańßan kn…ĺmux qmlańßaŇč a ¶im…ônid waŇč ¶aw, saj…ĺjoku tikwo, tasja. bukuj daw wada dan kn…ĺmux qmlańßaŇč ansi tikwo na a…ĺsak waŇč ¶aw (b…ĺańß koŇčw…ôn kŇčkawas ***- b…ĺańß koŇčw…ôn kŇčkawas ***), ijax niji u wada da kn…ĺmux kujswaŇč tikwo duŇčan. * tńß, s…ôdiq a…ĺapo u wada dńßa Ňčalan ka tu…ĺkm…ônistan daw, s…ôdiq tndx…ĺal ńßija u kndudul knp…ĺijux snluńßaj islam kjo. s…ôdiq ukus mniq *-* s…ôki ¶ida ka mijańß ńßidu. ¶Ňč- ¶ tub…ĺańß nija tu…ĺkm…ônistan u mns…ĺj…ôn na * nniqan tuk ¶ka asia tumal koŇčńßkwo, mniq kŇčkawas **** mk…ĺńßak ka su…ĺj…ôn daw, wada mduku…ĺi ¶u qnlńßaŇčan, muda pnwaja ¶oto ¶u. kndadax kŇčkawas **** tumal koŇčńßkwo ¶ ¶ida na tu…ĺkm…ônistan kjosaŇčto ¶oŇčjaŇč tu* suki ka sapa…ĺmu…ĺat ataj…ôwiki nija ¶ońßu, mniq kŇčkawas **** babaw mk…ĺńßak ka su…ĺj…ôn daw, wada mduku…ĺi ¶u qnlńßaŇčan, muda pnwaja ¶oto ¶u. kndadax kŇčkawas **** tumal koŇčńßkwo ¶ ¶ida kija ka tu…ĺkm…ônistan kjosaŇčto ¶oŇčjaŇč tu* suki ka sapa…ĺmu…ĺat ataj…ôwiki nija ¶ońßu, mniq kŇčkawas **** idas ** lmutu ¶ pńßjuwan soto, kija mi dmnkuńß ńßija maŇčal bijax qmlańßaŇč ka tu…ĺkm…ônistan kjosaŇčto pa wada knp…ĺijux ńßaŇčan tu…ĺkm…ônistan min ¶u taŇč, mu…ĺu dndulan taŇč msupu s…ôńßu tu…ĺkm…ônistan muda qmpańß qmlańßaŇč mi ńßniwan s…ô…üi. babaw duku…ĺi ¶u ka tu…ĺkm…ônistan u ana mntna po…ĺotińßaj ttu* qnlńßaŇčan ini tumal duku…ĺi ¶u qnlńßaŇčan kwosj…ô, kija mi dmuwi ńßniwan …ĺj…ônsi qnlńßaŇčan tumal qu…ĺi so pnsslijan dńßa, kija u so qu…ĺi ńßnjuwan dńßa dńßuq saja u ida ini balaj baj maŇčal sn…ĺwanan sj…ôn ¶aŇč nina. siŇč- ¶Ňč ¶ju-ńßwa tu…ĺkm…ônistan siŇč ¶Ňč ¶juńßwa kija ka knkan * ¶o mi * ¶usjasu, t…ĺańßu ¶ * ¶o u niqan ** su mi ** ka ¶ju. t…ĺańßu ¶ niji ka knkiŇčal ¶o mi ¶usjasu (k ¶ka kwańßaw ka sońßu): asońßapat ( ¶usjasu) * ańßa…ĺ ¶o (annau) * pa…ĺkan ¶o (pa…ĺkan napat) * tasaku ¶ ¶o (tasaku ¶) * …ĺj…ôpapu ¶o (tu…ĺkm…ônistan napat) * ma…ĺi ¶o tu…ĺkm…ônistan u wa mniq tudaja i…ĺan, dq…ĺas tuna…ĺa ¶ ńßuna ¶ u tuńßuj a*gńßani msqapańß, dq…ĺas tuna…ĺa ¶ daja u tuńßuj o ¶b…ôkstan msdalińß, dq…ĺas tuiwil daja ka msdalińß ka*akńßstan, tuiwil u mssijaw m…ĺmul laŇču qsija lińßaj, kija ka kiŇčal mnduŇčus baj k ¶ka dx…ĺal qnlńßaŇčan. knlbaŇčan tndx…ĺal dńßa u **.** knbkijan pińßwaŇč km, mtńßiti bukuj ka*akńßstan na tuk ¶ka asia tu* knb…ôńßiŇč dx…ĺal qnlńßaŇčan; mniq qnlaŇčan u tu** bnkuwan, tipiŇč ńßa…ĺi spain ka dńßija. …ün-ko knńßb…ĺawan ńßiji s…ôdiq dńßa u *** knbkijan ńßiji (kŇčkawas ****), k ¶ka u to baj tu…ĺkm…ônistan …üoku ka **%, tńßiti daw o ¶b…ôk …üoku ka *.*%, …ĺussia …üoku ka *.*%, ka*akńßstan ka *%, duma so ini kńßba…ĺaw ńßiji min…üoku u kija ka knkana s…ôdiq jam…ônija, jasajpaj…üan …üoku, s…ôdiq tatan. ini balaj pnsdkanan ka pnsnakan s…ôdiq dńßa, knńßb…ĺawan baj s…ôdiq u to baj wa mniq alaŇč mkb…ĺnux mi …ĺju ¶o, k ¶ka ńßija u ńßba…ĺaw baj uxaj s…ôdiq tu…ĺkm…ônistan …üoku ka wa mniq alaŇč mkb…ĺnux, dńßija u su…ĺj…ôn …üidaji mijańß tńßdil tu…ĺkm…ônistan na llutu ¶ ds…ôdiq mpsalu nija mi s…ôdiq mpqpańß nija. kija u msdalińß */* na s…ôdiq tu…ĺkm…ônistan …üoku pa to baj wa mniq alaŇč dńßa nanaq ¶bijaw. ¶iŇč- ¶i k ¶ka qnlńßaŇčan sŇč ¶an ¶oŇč ¶u (kŇčkawas ****): *** knbkijan oku manat (ja baj *** oku pila ami…ĺika). …ün ¶jun k ¶ka qnlńßaŇčan sŇč ¶an ¶oŇč ¶u (kŇčkawas ****): *** knbkijan manat. (**** pila ami…ĺika) k ¶aka qnlńßaŇčan sŇč ¶aŇč ¶oŇč ¶u mn…ĺana …ĺju (kŇčkawas ****): **.*%. ńßaŇčan pila: manat. ńßuj…ĺju: * pila ami…ĺika= **,*** manat (kŇčkawas **** ńß…ôsu ńßuj…ĺju, s…ôńßu ńßuj…ĺju ka *:****). …ĺ…ĺmiwaw qqpańßan …ĺnjawan tu…ĺkm…ônistan, qu…ĺi so pqita na…ĺux sdmńßaw …ĺmiwaw, mniq tu…ĺkm…ônistan u wada dmudul pk…ĺana lińßaj na a*a*a snanan …ĺmiwaw. txtaxa mpmusa tu…ĺkm…ônistan na s…ôdiq mp…ĺiwaw u kasi ka dńßuq maŇčal sn…ĺwanan ¶j…ô ¶Ňč ńßan, kija mi ńßba…ĺaw baj s…ôdiq mp…ĺiwaw qnlńßaŇčan u kasi ka spuda tndx…ĺal …ĺjusiŇčso maŇčal sn…ĺwanan ¶j…ôn ¶Ňč. bnkuwan …ĺnjawan tu…ĺkm…ônistan pa kija ka knkana …ĺmiwaw tasaku ¶, kunijau…ĺkn ¶i, nisa, m…ô…ĺńßu, ma…ĺi, a*a*a na bbnaqi mkŇčańßu u ¶iluŇč, kija mi tumal dijax smsuŇč mnniq mollaka…ĺa, jjllj suw,a…ĺ ¶ńßman. buŇčka mniq ** tńß b…ĺańß ńßan, dx…ĺal nniqan tu…ĺkm…ônistan u wada dndulan buŇčka islam. ** tńß u jańßa kn…ĺmux maŇčal sao ka tuk ¶ka asia, kija mi smkaul s…ôdiq …ĺussia mijańß tuk ¶ka asia tmabun pk…ĺana, buŇčka …ĺussia u kndudul mijańß m…ĺwa…ĺaŇč u…ĺi da. binaw kndadax wada mk…ĺńßak ka su…ĺj…ôn, wada mduku…ĺi ¶u qnlńßaŇčan ka tu…ĺkm…ônistan daw, alaw ka wada kndudul mlińß ka dndulan nija …ĺussia, kija mi qnlńßaŇčan dńßa u mbijax baj dmudul buŇčka islam, kija ka wada mlińß ka taxa mi m…ĺana ka taxa da. min…üoku kwo ¶iŇč w…ôpiŇč tu…ĺkmnistan …üoku **%, o ¶b…ôk …üoku *%, …ĺussia …üoku *%. snńßijan islam kjo ka pusu balaj slńßajan dńßa snńßijan, kija ka knkana knńßb…ĺawan ńßiji s…ôdiq na **%, pusu baj ka sjunnipaj muslim. kija u…ĺi u *% ka toŇčkjo na ku…ĺis ¶jaŇč. binaw mniq qmlańßaŇč ¶jaŇč ¶w…ôn soto sapa…ĺmu…ĺat ataj…ôwiki nija ¶ońßu, mbijax baj dmudul buŇčka islam, so snluńßaj toŇčkjo na ini kńßba…ĺaw s…ôdiq …ĺussia u kndudul mlata ¶ tu…ĺkm…ônistan mi tńßdil i ¶il, so kija daw wada mlińß dndulan nija mniq tu…ĺkm…ônistan ka toŇč ¶Ňčkjo u…ĺi da.
S.FORM: = Turkmenistan = Gaga kska Yacow ka Turkmenistan, 40 00 N, 60 00 E ka gaga na nniqan. Kana ka knlbangan na o 488,100 sq km(hangan na o Tg53) (knlbanga dxgal o 469,930 sq km, knlbangan qsiya o 18,170 sq km). Kana ka sejiqun o niqan 5,291,317 hiyi. Gaga Ashgabat ka pusu alang paru, jiyax 27 idas 10 ka jiyax skrayan klwaan. Manu ka dxgal Turkmenistan ga wada sugan 72% ka dxgal qpahan, 8.80% ka dxgal bbuyu, rahuq dxgal do niqan 19.20% na. Bukung klwaan ta sayang o kiya ka Gurbanguly Berdimuhamedow, pnaah hngkawas2006 idas 12 jiyax 21pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' = Turkmenistan = Turkmenistan (Kari Turkmenistan: T√ľrkmenistan ) ka kingal Tukcka Asia tuiwil hunac na qlhangan kcka dxral, tuiwil u msdalih Ucilung Li, tudaya mi tunarac mi tuhunac u pskingal psqapah Kazakhstan, Ocbek, Afghani mi Iran, knlbangan tndxral dha u 49 knbkiyan pinghwang km, mthiti bukuy Kazakhstan na Tukcka Asia tu2 knbeyhing dxral qnlhangan, ya bay 80% qlhangan u wada bungan Karakumu bbnaqi bbuyu. Kngkawas 1991 pkla kari snpeyyah Suryey dukuricu, Turkmenistan uri ka knkana Asia murux bay Ana Dhuq Knuwan Qnlhangan Congri, gasoring mi gasu ida nkiya cuweyn u mttuku balay. Ri-s Brah kongweyn kngkawas 3000, kcka tndxral qlhangan Turkmenistan u mnniqan cyeyci syakay. Ya bay brah kongweyn kngkawas 600 daw, snkkingal Pssryuxan yahan knrmux qmlahang Acimeynid Wangcaw, Sayryoku Tikwo, Tasya. Bukuy daw wada dan knrmux qmlahang Ansi Tikwo na Arsak Wangcaw (Brah kongweyn kngkawas 247- Brah kongweyn kngkawas 224), iyax niyi u wada da knrmux Kuyswang Tikwo dungan. 7 th, sediq Arapo u wada dha ngalan ka Turkmenistan daw, sediq tndxral hiya u kndudul knpriyux snluhay Islam kyo. Sediq Ukus mniq 8-9 seyki cida ka miyah hidu. Cng-c Tubrah niya Turkmenistan u mnSryeyn na 1 nniqan tukcka Asia tumal konghkwo, mniq kngkawas 1991 mkrhak ka Suryeyn daw, wada mdukuricu qnlhangan, muda pnwaya cotocu. Kndadax kngkawas 1985 tumal konghkwo ccida na Turkmenistan kyosangto congyang tu1 suki ka Saparmurat Atayewiki Niyacohu, mniq kngkawas 1991 babaw mkrhak ka Suryeyn daw, wada mdukuricu qnlhangan, muda pnwaya cotocu. Kndadax kngkawas 1985 tumal konghkwo ccida kiya ka Turkmenistan kyosangto congyang tu1 suki ka Saparmurat Atayewiki Niyacohu, mniq kngkawas 1991 idas 12 lmutuc phyuwan soto, kiya mi dmnkuh hiya mangal biyax qmlahang ka Turkmenistan kyosangto pa wada knpriyux hangan Turkmenistan mincu tang, muru dndulan tang msupu seyhu Turkmenistan muda qmpah qmlahang mi hniwan seyji. Babaw dukuricu ka Turkmenistan u ana mntna Porotihay ttu3 qnlhangan ini tumal dukuricu qnlhangan kwosyey, kiya mi dmuwi hniwan ryeynsi qnlhangan tumal quri so pnssliyan dha, kiya u so quri hnyuwan dha dhuq saya u ida ini balay bay mangal snrwanan syeyncang nina. Sing-cng cyu-hwa Turkmenistan singcng cyuhwa kiya ka knkan 5 co mi 1 cusyasu, trahuc 5 co u niqan 16 su mi 46 ka cyu. Trahuc niyi ka knkingal co mi cusyasu (kcka kwahaw ka sohu): Asohapat (Cusyasu) 1 Ahar co (Annau) 2 Parkan co (Parkan Napat) 3 Tasakuc co (Tasakuc) 4 Ryeypapu co (Turkmenistan Napat) 5 Mari co Turkmenistan u wa mniq tudaya Iran, dqras tunarac hunac u tuhuy Afghani msqapah, dqras tunarac daya u tuhuy Ocbekstan msdalih, dqras tuiwil daya ka msdalih Kazakhstan, tuiwil u mssiyaw mrmul langu qsiya Lihay, kiya ka kingal mndungus bay kcka dxral qnlhangan. Knlbangan tndxral dha u 49.12 knbkiyan pihwang km, mthiti bukuy Kazakhstan na Tukcka Asia tu2 knbeyhing dxral qnlhangan; mniq qnlangan u tu51 bnkuwan, tiping hari Spain ka dhiya. Jn-ko Knhbrawan hiyi sediq dha u 603 knbkiyan hiyi (Kngkawas 2002), kcka u to bay Turkmenistan joku ka 77%, thiti daw Ocbek joku ka 9.2%, Russia joku ka 6.7%, Kazakhstan ka 2%, duma so ini khbaraw hiyi minjoku u kiya ka knkana sediq Yameniya, Yasaypayjan joku, sediq Tatan. Ini balay pnsdkanan ka pnsnakan sediq dha, knhbrawan bay sediq u to bay wa mniq alang mkbrnux mi Ryuco, kcka hiya u hbaraw bay uxay sediq Turkmenistan joku ka wa mniq alang mkbrnux, dhiya u Suryeyn jidayi miyah thdil Turkmenistan na llutuc dsediq mpsalu niya mi sediq mpqpah niya. Kiya u msdalih 2/3 na sediq Turkmenistan joku pa to bay wa mniq alang dha nanaq cbiyaw. Cing-ci Kcka qnlhangan sngcan congcu (Kngkawas 2004): 988 knbkiyan oku manat (Ya bay 190 oku pila Amirika). Jncyun kcka qnlhangan sngcan congcu (Kngkawas 2004): 156 knbkiyan Manat. (3000 pila Amirika) Kcaka qnlhangan sngcang congcu mnrana ryu (Kngkawas 2004): 21.4%. Hangan pila: Manat. Huyryu: 1 pila Amirika= 23,700 Manat (Kngkawas 2006 heysu huyryu, seyhu huyryu ka 1:5200). Rrmiwaw Qqpahan rnyawan Turkmenistan, quri so pqita narux sdmhaw rmiwaw, mniq Turkmenistan u wada dmudul pkrana Lihay na Avaza snanan rmiwaw. Txtaxa mpmusa Turkmenistan na sediq mpriwaw u kasi ka dhuq mangal snrwanan cyeycng han, kiya mi hbaraw bay sediq mpriwaw qnlhangan u kasi ka spuda tndxral ryusingso mangal snrwanan cyeyncng. Bnkuwan rnyawan Turkmenistan pa kiya ka knkana rmiwaw Tasakuc, Kuniyaurknci, Nisa, Merhu, Mari, Avaza na bbnaqi mkngahu ucilung, kiya mi tumal diyax smsung mnniq Mollakara, Yylly suw,Archman. Bungka Mniq 18 th brah han, dxral nniqan Turkmenistan u wada dndulan bungka Islam. 18 th u yaha knrmux mangal Sao ka Tukcka Asia, kiya mi smkaul sediq Russia miyah Tukcka Asia tmabun pkrana, bungka Russia u kndudul miyah mrwarang uri da. Binaw kndadax wada mkrhak ka Suryeyn, wada mdukuricu qnlhangan ka Turkmenistan daw, alaw ka wada kndudul mlih ka dndulan niya Russia, kiya mi qnlhangan dha u mbiyax bay dmudul bungka Islam, kiya ka wada mlih ka taxa mi mrana ka taxa da. Minjoku Kwocing weyping Turkmnistan joku 85%, Ocbek joku 5%, Russia joku 4%. Snhiyan Islam kyo ka pusu balay slhayan dha snhiyan, kiya ka knkana knhbrawan hiyi Sediq na 89%, pusu bay ka Syunnipay Muslim. Kiya uri u 9% ka Tongkyo na Kuriscyang. Binaw mniq qmlahang cyangcweyn soto Saparmurat Atayewiki Niyacohu, mbiyax bay dmudul bungka Islam, so snluhay Tongkyo na ini khbaraw sediq Russia u kndudul mlatac Turkmenistan mi thdil icil, so kiya daw wada mlih dndulan niya mniq Turkmenistan ka Tongcngkyo uri da.

qsija o **,*** sq km). kana ka s…ô…üiqun o niqan *,***,*** ńßiji. gaga asńßgabat ka pusu alaŇč pa…ĺu, …üijax ** idas ** ka …üijax sk…ĺajan klwaan. manu ka dxgal tu…ĺkm…ônistan ga wada sugan **% ka dxgal qpańßan, *.**% ka dxgal bbuju, …ĺańßuq dxgal do niqan **.**% na. bukuŇč klwaan ta sajaŇč o kija ka gu…ĺbaŇčulj b…ô…ĺdimuńßam…ôdow, pnaańß ńßŇčkawas**** idas ** …üijax **pn…ĺa…üiŇč kmlawa klwaan. ¶inkńßulan sa knita' sa b…ĺbi…ĺu' = tu…ĺkm…ônistan = tu…ĺkm…ônistan (ka…ĺi tu…ĺkm…ônistan: t*…ĺkm…ônistan ) ka kiŇčal tuk ¶ka asia tuiwil ńßuna ¶ na qlńßaŇčan k ¶ka dx…ĺal, tuiwil u msdalińß u ¶iluŇč li, tudaja mi tuna…ĺa ¶ mi tuńßuna ¶ u pskiŇčal psqapańß ka*akńßstan, o ¶b…ôk, a*gńßani mi i…ĺan, knlbaŇčan tndx…ĺal dńßa u ** knbkijan piŇčńßwaŇč km, mtńßiti bukuj ka*akńßstan na tuk ¶ka asia tu* knb…ôńßiŇč dx…ĺal qnlńßaŇčan, ja baj **% qlńßaŇčan u wada buŇčan ka…ĺakumu bbnaqi bbuju. kŇčkawas **** pkla ka…ĺi snp…ôjańß su…ĺj…ô duku…ĺi ¶u, tu…ĺkm…ônistan u…ĺi ka knkana asia mu…ĺux baj ana dńßuq knuwan qnlńßaŇčan ¶oŇč…ĺi, gaso…ĺiŇč mi gasu ida nkija ¶uw…ôn u mttuku balaj. …ĺi-s b…ĺańß koŇčw…ôn kŇčkawas ****, k ¶ka tndx…ĺal qlńßaŇčan tu…ĺkm…ônistan u mnniqan ¶j…ô ¶i sjakaj. ja baj b…ĺańß koŇčw…ôn kŇčkawas *** daw, snkkiŇčal pss…ĺjuxan jańßan kn…ĺmux qmlańßaŇč a ¶im…ônid waŇč ¶aw, saj…ĺjoku tikwo, tasja. bukuj daw wada dan kn…ĺmux qmlańßaŇč ansi tikwo na a…ĺsak waŇč ¶aw (b…ĺańß koŇčw…ôn kŇčkawas ***- b…ĺańß koŇčw…ôn kŇčkawas ***), ijax niji u wada da kn…ĺmux kujswaŇč tikwo duŇčan. * tńß, s…ôdiq a…ĺapo u wada dńßa Ňčalan ka tu…ĺkm…ônistan daw, s…ôdiq tndx…ĺal ńßija u kndudul knp…ĺijux snluńßaj islam kjo. s…ôdiq ukus mniq *-* s…ôki ¶ida ka mijańß ńßidu. ¶Ňč- ¶ tub…ĺańß nija tu…ĺkm…ônistan u mns…ĺj…ôn na * nniqan tuk ¶ka asia tumal koŇčńßkwo, mniq kŇčkawas **** mk…ĺńßak ka su…ĺj…ôn daw, wada mduku…ĺi ¶u qnlńßaŇčan, muda pnwaja ¶oto ¶u. kndadax kŇčkawas **** tumal koŇčńßkwo ¶ ¶ida na tu…ĺkm…ônistan kjosaŇčto ¶oŇčjaŇč tu* suki ka sapa…ĺmu…ĺat ataj…ôwiki nija ¶ońßu, mniq kŇčkawas **** babaw mk…ĺńßak ka su…ĺj…ôn daw, wada mduku…ĺi ¶u qnlńßaŇčan, muda pnwaja ¶oto ¶u. kndadax kŇčkawas **** tumal koŇčńßkwo ¶ ¶ida kija ka tu…ĺkm…ônistan kjosaŇčto ¶oŇčjaŇč tu* suki ka sapa…ĺmu…ĺat ataj…ôwiki nija ¶ońßu, mniq kŇčkawas **** idas ** lmutu ¶ pńßjuwan soto, kija mi dmnkuńß ńßija maŇčal bijax qmlańßaŇč ka tu…ĺkm…ônistan kjosaŇčto pa wada knp…ĺijux ńßaŇčan tu…ĺkm…ônistan min ¶u taŇč, mu…ĺu dndulan taŇč msupu s…ôńßu tu…ĺkm…ônistan muda qmpańß qmlańßaŇč mi ńßniwan s…ô…üi. babaw duku…ĺi ¶u ka tu…ĺkm…ônistan u ana mntna po…ĺotińßaj ttu* qnlńßaŇčan ini tumal duku…ĺi ¶u qnlńßaŇčan kwosj…ô, kija mi dmuwi ńßniwan …ĺj…ônsi qnlńßaŇčan tumal qu…ĺi so pnsslijan dńßa, kija u so qu…ĺi ńßnjuwan dńßa dńßuq saja u ida ini balaj baj maŇčal sn…ĺwanan sj…ôn ¶aŇč nina. siŇč- ¶Ňč ¶ju-ńßwa tu…ĺkm…ônistan siŇč ¶Ňč ¶juńßwa kija ka knkan * ¶o mi * ¶usjasu, t…ĺańßu ¶ * ¶o u niqan ** su mi ** ka ¶ju. t…ĺańßu ¶ niji ka knkiŇčal ¶o mi ¶usjasu (k ¶ka kwańßaw ka sońßu): asońßapat ( ¶usjasu) * ańßa…ĺ ¶o (annau) * pa…ĺkan ¶o (pa…ĺkan napat) * tasaku ¶ ¶o (tasaku ¶) * …ĺj…ôpapu ¶o (tu…ĺkm…ônistan napat) * ma…ĺi ¶o tu…ĺkm…ônistan u wa mniq tudaja i…ĺan, dq…ĺas tuna…ĺa ¶ ńßuna ¶ u tuńßuj a*gńßani msqapańß, dq…ĺas tuna…ĺa ¶ daja u tuńßuj o ¶b…ôkstan msdalińß, dq…ĺas tuiwil daja ka msdalińß ka*akńßstan, tuiwil u mssijaw m…ĺmul laŇču qsija lińßaj, kija ka kiŇčal mnduŇčus baj k ¶ka dx…ĺal qnlńßaŇčan. knlbaŇčan tndx…ĺal dńßa u **.** knbkijan pińßwaŇč km, mtńßiti bukuj ka*akńßstan na tuk ¶ka asia tu* knb…ôńßiŇč dx…ĺal qnlńßaŇčan; mniq qnlaŇčan u tu** bnkuwan, tipiŇč ńßa…ĺi spain ka dńßija. …ün-ko knńßb…ĺawan ńßiji s…ôdiq dńßa u *** knbkijan ńßiji (kŇčkawas ****), k ¶ka u to baj tu…ĺkm…ônistan …üoku ka **%, tńßiti daw o ¶b…ôk …üoku ka *.*%, …ĺussia …üoku ka *.*%, ka*akńßstan ka *%, duma so ini kńßba…ĺaw ńßiji min…üoku u kija ka knkana s…ôdiq jam…ônija, jasajpaj…üan …üoku, s…ôdiq tatan. ini balaj pnsdkanan ka pnsnakan s…ôdiq dńßa, knńßb…ĺawan baj s…ôdiq u to baj wa mniq alaŇč mkb…ĺnux mi …ĺju ¶o, k ¶ka ńßija u ńßba…ĺaw baj uxaj s…ôdiq tu…ĺkm…ônistan …üoku ka wa mniq alaŇč mkb…ĺnux, dńßija u su…ĺj…ôn …üidaji mijańß tńßdil tu…ĺkm…ônistan na llutu ¶ ds…ôdiq mpsalu nija mi s…ôdiq mpqpańß nija. kija u msdalińß */* na s…ôdiq tu…ĺkm…ônistan …üoku pa to baj wa mniq alaŇč dńßa nanaq ¶bijaw. ¶iŇč- ¶i k ¶ka qnlńßaŇčan sŇč ¶an ¶oŇč ¶u (kŇčkawas ****): *** knbkijan oku manat (ja baj *** oku pila ami…ĺika). …ün ¶jun k ¶ka qnlńßaŇčan sŇč ¶an ¶oŇč ¶u (kŇčkawas ****): *** knbkijan manat. (**** pila ami…ĺika) k ¶aka qnlńßaŇčan sŇč ¶aŇč ¶oŇč ¶u mn…ĺana …ĺju (kŇčkawas ****): **.*%. ńßaŇčan pila: manat. ńßuj…ĺju: * pila ami…ĺika= **,*** manat (kŇčkawas **** ńß…ôsu ńßuj…ĺju, s…ôńßu ńßuj…ĺju ka *:****). …ĺ…ĺmiwaw qqpańßan …ĺnjawan tu…ĺkm…ônistan, qu…ĺi so pqita na…ĺux sdmńßaw …ĺmiwaw, mniq tu…ĺkm…ônistan u wada dmudul pk…ĺana lińßaj na a*a*a snanan …ĺmiwaw. txtaxa mpmusa tu…ĺkm…ônistan na s…ôdiq mp…ĺiwaw u kasi ka dńßuq maŇčal sn…ĺwanan ¶j…ô ¶Ňč ńßan, kija mi ńßba…ĺaw baj s…ôdiq mp…ĺiwaw qnlńßaŇčan u kasi ka spuda tndx…ĺal …ĺjusiŇčso maŇčal sn…ĺwanan ¶j…ôn ¶Ňč. bnkuwan …ĺnjawan tu…ĺkm…ônistan pa kija ka knkana …ĺmiwaw tasaku ¶, kunijau…ĺkn ¶i, nisa, m…ô…ĺńßu, ma…ĺi, a*a*a na bbnaqi mkŇčańßu u ¶iluŇč, kija mi tumal dijax smsuŇč mnniq mollaka…ĺa, jjllj suw,a…ĺ ¶ńßman. buŇčka mniq ** tńß b…ĺańß ńßan, dx…ĺal nniqan tu…ĺkm…ônistan u wada dndulan buŇčka islam. ** tńß u jańßa kn…ĺmux maŇčal sao ka tuk ¶ka asia, kija mi smkaul s…ôdiq …ĺussia mijańß tuk ¶ka asia tmabun pk…ĺana, buŇčka …ĺussia u kndudul mijańß m…ĺwa…ĺaŇč u…ĺi da. binaw kndadax wada mk…ĺńßak ka su…ĺj…ôn, wada mduku…ĺi ¶u qnlńßaŇčan ka tu…ĺkm…ônistan daw, alaw ka wada kndudul mlińß ka dndulan nija …ĺussia, kija mi qnlńßaŇčan dńßa u mbijax baj dmudul buŇčka islam, kija ka wada mlińß ka taxa mi m…ĺana ka taxa da. min…üoku kwo ¶iŇč w…ôpiŇč tu…ĺkmnistan …üoku **%, o ¶b…ôk …üoku *%, …ĺussia …üoku *%. snńßijan islam kjo ka pusu balaj slńßajan dńßa snńßijan, kija ka knkana knńßb…ĺawan ńßiji s…ôdiq na **%, pusu baj ka sjunnipaj muslim. kija u…ĺi u *% ka toŇčkjo na ku…ĺis ¶jaŇč. binaw mniq qmlańßaŇč ¶jaŇč ¶w…ôn soto sapa…ĺmu…ĺat ataj…ôwiki nija ¶ońßu, mbijax baj dmudul buŇčka islam, so snluńßaj toŇčkjo na ini kńßba…ĺaw s…ôdiq …ĺussia u kndudul mlata ¶ tu…ĺkm…ônistan mi tńßdil i ¶il, so kija daw wada mlińß dndulan nija mniq tu…ĺkm…ônistan ka toŇč ¶Ňčkjo u…ĺi da.
